description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet featuring a predominantly yellow front and side panels with bold red trim. The front panel displays a large, colorful Pac-Man logo above a screen area, with a control panel below that includes a joystick and several buttons, as well as a dual coin slot mechanism. The side panels are decorated with vibrant artwork depicting a blue ghost and Pac-Man, along with stylized maze graphics and the 'PAC-MAN' title in an arched, retro font. The top of the cabinet features a marquee area with the Pac-Man logo and character art, framed by the red side rails. The back of the cabinet is plain black, with a small yellow detail near the bottom, likely for ventilation or access. The overall structure is boxy and robust, designed to stand upright in public spaces such as arcades, malls, or entertainment venues.
description: A classic upright Pac-Man arcade cabinet with yellow panels, red trim, colorful side artwork, and a prominent control panel with joystick and buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Pac-Man marquee, screen area, control panel with joystick and buttons, and dual coin slots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large blue ghost and Pac-Man artwork, yellow background, and red trim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black panel with a small yellow detail near the bottom, no artwork or controls visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with identical blue ghost and Pac-Man graphics and yellow background.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen area.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and several round buttons, arranged in a horizontal row, with a black background and colored button tops.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'PAC-MAN' logo in yellow with stylized font, Pac-Man character, and a ghost, set on a yellow background with a retro arcade theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large, colorful artwork depicting a blue ghost and Pac-Man, with maze elements and the 'PAC-MAN' title in an arched style on a yellow background.
